what_it_does: Records a channel attachment ledger entry for an image in the design-source channel, linking it to the image URI image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-05 and capturing an id, attachment type, target, and added timestamp.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content
target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to design-source/pitch-deck/p-05
added timestamp is an ISO 8601 UTC value
standouts: Serves as a ledger record for a pitch-deck image asset
Uses a channel-scoped image:// URI as the canonical target
notes: A minimal, timestamped attachment ledger entry that points to a design-source pitch-deck image asset.
questions: What image format or file extension does the target URI resolve to?
Which slide or page number in the pitch deck is p-05?
Who added this attachment and in what message context?
purpose_vs_actual: The fields match the apparent purpose of an attachment ledger record; there is no explicit stated purpose beyond the metadata itself.
intention_signals: To catalog and provide a stable reference to an image asset shared in the design-source channel so it can be located and retrieved by URI.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped attachment identifier and a URI pointer for a pitch-deck image in the design-source channel, supporting retrieval and provenance without embedding the asset.
summary_for_embedding: YAML metadata attachment record att-9ff5abad in the design-source channel pointing to image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-05, added 2026-06-22T11:31:00Z.
intention_for_embedding: Record and reference a pitch-deck image asset shared in the design-source channel.
